name: GFxtoolz
description: v1 login-only checker — POST /api/v1/auth/login (plan detection later)
user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/149.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
notes: v1: valid login only — no plan/subscription check yet.
POST JSON: email, password, deviceFingerprint (8-256 chars).
Header: x-device-fingerprint must match body fingerprint.
Fail: HTTP 401 code INVALID_CREDENTIALS — Invalid email or password.
Hit: HTTP 200/201 with accessToken in JSON.
Turnstile token not required for /auth/login (only secure-api tool routes).
